# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Kafka broker configuration file (server.properties) for production deployment. Configure listeners, log directories, and replication settings. Set up Zookeeper connection and broker ID. This is for our distributed Kafka cluster.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for kafka topic authorization and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: kafka_topic_authorization

# Kafka Broker Configuration - server.properties
# Production Deployment for Distributed Cluster

############################# Server Basics #############################

# Unique broker ID for this node in the cluster
broker.id=1

############################# Socket Server Settings #############################

# Listeners with SASL_SSL for secure inter-broker and client communication
listeners=SASL_SSL://0.0.0.0:9093
advertised.listeners=SASL_SSL://kafka-broker-1.example.com:9093

# Inter-broker communication protocol
inter.broker.listener.name=SASL_SSL
security.inter.broker.protocol=SASL_SSL

# SASL mechanism configuration
sasl.mechanism.inter.broker.protocol=SCRAM-SHA-512
sasl.enabled.mechanisms=SCRAM-SHA-512

# SSL/TLS configuration
ssl.keystore.location=/etc/kafka/ssl/kafka.broker1.keystore.jks
ssl.keystore.password=${KAFKA_KEYSTORE_PASSWORD}
ssl.key.password=${KAFKA_KEY_PASSWORD}
ssl.truststore.location=/etc/kafka/ssl/kafka.truststore.jks
ssl.truststore.password=${KAFKA_TRUSTSTORE_PASSWORD}
ssl.endpoint.identification.algorithm=https
ssl.client.auth=required
ssl.protocol=TLSv1.3
ssl.enabled.protocols=TLSv1.3,TLSv1.2

# Network threads and I/O threads
num.network.threads=8
num.io.threads=16
socket.send.buffer.bytes=102400
socket.receive.buffer.bytes=102400
socket.request.max.bytes=104857600

############################# Authorization (ACL) Settings #############################

# Enable the built-in ACL authorizer for topic authorization
authorizer.class.name=kafka.security.authorizer.AclAuthorizer

# Only super users bypass ACL checks - restrict to admin principal only
super.users=User:kafka-admin

# Deny access by default if no ACL is found (secure by default)
allow.everyone.if.no.acl.found=false

# ACL storage in ZooKeeper with secure connection
zookeeper.set.acl=true

############################# Log Basics #############################

# Comma-separated list of log directories for data durability
log.dirs=/var/kafka-logs/data1,/var/kafka-logs/data2,/var/kafka-logs/data3

# Default number of partitions per topic
num.partitions=6

# Number of threads per data directory for log recovery at startup and flushing
num.recovery.threads.per.data.dir=2

############################# Replication Settings #############################

# Default replication factor for automatically created topics
default.replication.factor=3

# Minimum number of in-sync replicas required for a write to be considered successful
min.insync.replicas=2

# Unclean leader election - disabled for data consistency
unclean.leader.election.enable=false

# Replica fetch settings
replica.fetch.max.bytes=1048576
replica.fetch.wait.max.ms=500
replica.lag.time.max.ms=30000

# Number of fetcher threads for replicating messages from source brokers
num.replica.fetchers=4

############################# Internal Topic Settings #############################

# Replication factor for internal topics: __consumer_offsets and __transaction_state
offsets.topic.replication.factor=3
transaction.state.log.replication.factor=3
transaction.state.log.min.isr=2

############################# Log Flush Policy #############################

# Flush interval based on messages and time
log.flush.interval.messages=10000
log.flush.interval.ms=1000

############################# Log Retention Policy #############################

# Retention by time (7 days)
log.retention.hours=168

# Retention by size per partition (50 GB)
log.retention.bytes=53687091200

# Maximum size of a single log segment file (1 GB)
log.segment.bytes=1073741824

# Interval for checking if any log needs to be deleted
log.retention.check.interval.ms=300000

# Log cleaner settings
log.cleaner.enable=true
log.cleanup.policy=delete

############################# Zookeeper #############################

# Zookeeper connection string (ensemble of 3 nodes)
zookeeper.connect=zk1.example.com:2181,zk2.example.com:2181,zk3.example.com:2181/kafka-production

# Zookeeper connection and session timeouts
zookeeper.connection.timeout.ms=18000
zookeeper.session.timeout.ms=18000

# Enable secure ZooKeeper client connection
zookeeper.clientCnxnSocket=org.apache.zookeeper.ClientCnxnSocketNetty
zookeeper.ssl.client.enable=true
zookeeper.ssl.keystore.location=/etc/kafka/ssl/kafka.broker1.keystore.jks
zookeeper.ssl.keystore.password=${KAFKA_KEYSTORE_PASSWORD}
zookeeper.ssl.truststore.location=/etc/kafka/ssl/kafka.truststore.jks
zookeeper.ssl.truststore.password=${KAFKA_TRUSTSTORE_PASSWORD}

############################# Group Coordinator Settings #############################

# Delay for initial consumer rebalance (production setting)
group.initial.rebalance.delay.ms=3000
group.max.session.timeout.ms=1800000
group.min.session.timeout.ms=6000

############################# Controlled Shutdown #############################

controlled.shutdown.enable=true
controlled.shutdown.max.retries=3
controlled.shutdown.retry.backoff.ms=5000

############################# Producer/Consumer Quotas #############################

# Default quotas to prevent any single client from overwhelming the broker
quota.producer.default=10485760
quota.consumer.default=10485760

############################# Metrics and Monitoring #############################

# Enable JMX metrics
kafka.metrics.reporters=
metric.reporters=

# Auto topic creation disabled for production (topics must be created explicitly with ACLs)
auto.create.topics.enable=false

# Auto leader rebalance
auto.leader.rebalance.enable=true
leader.imbalance.check.interval.seconds=300
leader.imbalance.per.broker.percentage=10

############################# Message Settings #############################

# Maximum message size (10 MB)
message.max.bytes=10485760
max.request.size=10485760

# Compression
compression.type=producer

############################# Connection Settings #############################

# Maximum number of connections per IP
max.connections.per.ip=100

# Connection idle timeout
connections.max.idle.ms=600000
